test_framework: pytest with pytest-cov, fixtures in tests/conftest.py
verification_instructions: Run pytest with coverage, ensure >= 90% and all tests pass
setup_instructions: python3.12 available, pip install pytest pytest-cov pyyaml
environment_constraints: Use python3.12 for all commands. No external network needed.
contribution_requirements: Tests must pass, coverage >= 90%, commit after each round
key_patterns: Kernel modules in kernel/, tests in tests/test_*.py, knowledge store in knowledge/store.py, memory state in memory/state_manager.py. Each module has matching test file. YAML configs, JSONL for append-only logs. Contracts in kernel/contracts/ as markdown files with Python validator in __init__.py.
directory_structure: Root: runner.py, kernel/ (core logic with contracts/, evolution/, philosophy/, prompts/, adapters/), knowledge/ (skills/rules/patterns with store.py), memory/ (state_manager.py), tests/ (all test files)
